provenance.note: Reproducible fixture-mode results over synthetic, openly-licensed data with provider-neutral model aliases. Latency and estimated cost are representative fixtures, not live measurements. No employer or customer data, prompts, or IP appear anywhere.

models.label: Frontier A
models.note: Highest-capability tier stand-in — most accurate, most expensive, higher latency.

models.label: Balanced B
models.note: Mid tier — strong accuracy at a fraction of the cost.

models.label: Compact C
models.note: Smallest/cheapest/fastest tier — trades accuracy and robustness for price and latency.
